justification: All 7 rules identified with correct invariant classifications. BR-7 (refund window) correctly marked invariant: false. BR-1 explicitly captures that cart-add does NOT reserve inventory (checkout only). BR-2 marks the 15-minute timeout as invariant: false (debatable but well-reasoned — the timeout concept is invariant, the duration is policy). Ambiguities surfaced include discount priority resolution, 30-day window calendar/business days, 15-minute timeout start semantics, and price locking mid-session. 11 Given/When/Then acceptance criteria provided, far exceeding the 4 minimum. Confidence level of 75 is appropriate with clearly stated assumptions.
